dict.string: This defuss-tauri app may access the camera when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may access the microphone when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may access location when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may access Bluetooth when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may access Bluetooth peripherals when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may access local network devices during development and runtime.
This defuss-tauri app may access speech recognition when requested by the web app.
This defuss-tauri app may send Apple Events when explicitly requested by the app.
